query: SELECT id, panelNumber, LEFT(imageUrl, 120) as imageUrl, LEFT(visualDescription, 80) as visualDesc FROM panels WHERE episodeId = 870004 AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL ORDER BY panelNumber LIMIT 5;
